input: session sequences of user clicks (item interactions within a session)
output: next-item prediction (ranking of candidate items for the current session)
backbone: Multi-hop Multi-view Memory Transformer (M3T) with GNN for graph-view
loss: cross-entropy loss (implied by next-item prediction task)
key_idea: integrates sequence-view and graph-view item information via multi-view memory transformer and multi-hop graph propagation to capture latent user intentions
